necessityProof.blockerResolved: After v2129 migrated two prerequisite-chain families, endpoint-handle allowlist approval and signed-human approval artifact renderers still repeated the same markdown frame while embedding chain-specific contract, echo, snippet, and closure rows.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 Phase-B review can now treat four adjacent prerequisite-chain families as builder-backed and focus remaining scans on controlled read-only shard preview and other non-report renderer shapes.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared report builder owns the report frame. Contract detail rows, Java/mini-kv evidence files, expected snippets, Java v148 quality split rows, and closure prerequisite rows remain local because their line shapes are specific to each approval chain.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: This batch adds no helper. The next helper candidate must be justified by repeated same-field rows across more prerequisite chains and must preserve byte-identical output through temporary legacy comparison.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 6 endpoint/signed-human prerequisite chain tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2101-renderer-consolidation-batch-13-v2130.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2130 only changes Node markdown rendering for existing managed-audit prerequisite-chain reports; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
